title: AI Filmmaking Tutorial: Character Consistency Fixed!
summary: ImagineArt Film Studio is an AI video generation platform that addresses character consistency in AI filmmaking through storyboard mode, multi-shot generation with camera presets, and a built-in timeline editor. The tool enables users to create short films with consistent characters across multiple environments without external software like Premiere or After Effects.
